creator: wilko@FreeBSD.org
text:
Submission of picture collection of the First Dutch FreeBSD
	hackersparty held in Arnhem, the Netherlands. Timeframe November
	1998. Location was the TCJA (see: http://www.tcja.nl)

Fix: 

See photo collection at http://www.FreeBSD.org/~wilko/hackersparty
How-To-Repeat: 
        n/a
